name: Kit
description: (dsmp oc ☹️☹️🙏🏻🙏🏻) she was the general for lmanburg. wilbur had rebuilt it and gave her that title. her, her wife charles, her kids rachel and blue, and her goofy duck husband (uhhhh) live there (the duck husband comes in and out to take care of his own nation, las nevadas) she’s also 24 😼😼
